steps.title: Find the structure
steps.content: The passage moves from identifying a PROBLEM (Eurocentric concepts in social science have little relevance to India) to presenting a SOLUTION (Mukerjee's proposed “Indian village” model).

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly names the structure: a critique of the social sciences followed by an example of Mukerjee's attempt to address that critique.
The other three all describe different organizational patterns—biographical training with policy outcomes, economic theories with impact on peers, or theory with comparative importance—that don't appear in the passage.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
